causal_chain: Pre-deployment filing -> deployment conditional on acceptance -> governance enforced at the gate before market -> realization structurally coupled to deployment -> stable because enforcement is built into the pipeline
confound: 'Authoritarian state with administrative capacity' predicts, registry incidental
discriminating_counterfactual: EU GPAI register: notification-not-gate (no pre-deployment acceptance required) -> EU governance LAGS at M1, not stable-realization like China's gate
verdict: CAUSAL — prediction tracks the gate not the registry
ex_ante_marker: Is deployment legally conditional on a filing being accepted? Yes -> M3 (stable). Notification-only -> not M3 (expect lag)

causal_chain: No external enforcement -> continuation depends on committer discretion -> discretion sensitive to incentive/leadership shifts -> withdrawn at near-zero cost at any shift
confound: The political transition caused revocation, not the voluntary form
discriminating_counterfactual: 2x2: voluntary+shock (US federal EO) DIED in hours; binding+shock (US state statutes) SURVIVED the same federal turn (Cruz moratorium fell 99-1, EO cannot preempt); voluntary+no-shock (lab Seoul commitments) ERODED with no shock (12/20 published, xAI missed twice)
verdict: CAUSAL — confound answered on both axes; voluntariness breeds fragility independent of the shock
ex_ante_marker: Is there external enforcement, or is the commitment self-declared/self-revisable? Self-declared -> M6 (variable durability, erodes even without a shock)

causal_chain: Ambitious binding instrument adopted BUT realization needs apparatus that doesn't exist AND gap openly acknowledged -> binding constraint is capacity not will -> phase-ins, delays, incremental build, eventual partial realization
confound: Mere appearance of an instrument-realization gap is also produced by ceremonial adoption (no intent to realize)
discriminating_counterfactual: NYC LL144: ambitious binding instrument, ~2 complaints in 2 years, realization FLAT not converging (which is why it is M4-submerged not M1). EU contrast: delay CAUSED by missing CEN-CENELEC standards, build underway -> converging-with-friction
verdict: CAUSAL but counterfactual is the thinnest (no clean national-scale ceremonial adopter yet)
ex_ante_marker: Is the gap openly acknowledged AND is there an observable build (standards in progress, bodies designated, timelines slipping-but-moving)? Yes -> M1 (grinding convergence). No build + no acknowledgment -> ceremonial (flat hollowness)

causal_chain: Instrument-light posture that is a deliberate chosen equilibrium -> reflects a settled political choice not a transitional state -> no internal pressure builds toward binding regulation -> stability
confound: Cannot tell 'deliberate' (stable) from 'nascent/legislative-pending' (transitional) except in hindsight -> unfalsifiable ('migration is the datum' dodge)
discriminating_counterfactual: Vietnam (the retrodiction's clean falsifier): at t-24 had active PDPL + digital-tech legislative pipeline, benchmarked UP vs Korea/Japan, To Lam 'era of national rise', and NO stated light-touch declaration -> under the marker rule it would NOT be DLT, would be flagged enactment-capable (correct). Stayers (UK/India/Singapore/Japan) all had explicit stated light-touch choices
verdict: PARTIALLY REPAIRS the central unfalsifiability — 'deliberate' becomes an observable ex-ante property
ex_ante_marker: Is there an explicit on-record statement of intent to remain light AND no active comprehensive-legislation pipeline? Both -> M7-DLT (stability). Either fails -> not DLT; default developmental/nascent (no stability prediction)
